Prediction: Yes

The current visit record explicitly mentions "Pure hypercholesterolemia" as one of the diagnoses. This indicates that the patient has a recognized lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is documented, it is reasonable to predict that it will be coded as a diagnosis in the patient's next hospital visit, as there is clear evidence of an existing lipid metabolism disorder that is likely to be actively managed.
